proposal_summary: This proposal implements the Service Provider Program Season 2 (SPP2), increasing the annual budget to $4.5M to support 8 providers. It adjusts the Superfluid streaming infrastructure, provides 375,000 USDC in initial funding, and configures autowrap parameters.
